Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Genimal
Description:
Genimal, gotta kill them all
Its you and me, I know it’s my destiny
Genimal, oh, you're my best treat
In a world we must defeat!

Name: Celsius Thermoid
Description: This exclusive mutant has been created especially for the 20th anniversary of Celsius Online. Its characteristic green color appears when it is in its normal state, and changes to orange or blue when it is about to attack with its thermal attacks.

Name: Diablo
Description: Imprisoned for 200 years in a soulstone, Diablo was released in Genetic City by Urban, with the sole purpose of causing chaos. However, the forces that Urban unleashed were far more dangerous than he had anticipated, and the demon that he invoked annihilated both his armies and his enemies.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Irreality Animus
Description: When you combine Antimatter with normal matter, do you know what it makes? Nothing! Absolutely nothing! Both are disintegrated into nothingness… And that’s what makes this mutant so dangerous. \nIt comes from a region of the universe, where reality started to reverse itself: good people becoming evil, darkness becoming light… But someone thought it was a good idea to harness that reality-reversing effect, and turn it into a weapon to attack Earth. Will you manage to save the planet, or will you be consumed by the Antimatter?

Name: Singularity Wizard
Description:
Prof. ... - Experiment Log

January 15 - ... particle accelerator ... first tests ... evolution ... Mutant ...

March 12 - ... setback. ... Galactic DNA ... combine ...

June 2 - ... reactions ... evolution ... humanity ...

August 7 - ...  happy ... Singularity Wizard ... out of my control ... Let's go back to work on the experiments.

Name: Archangel
Description: Although Eva ended her career as Psy Captain, she has always kept an eye on the arena. Concerned that Urban's evolution would bring nothing good, she decided to design her own personal mutant. Woe to those who would do harm to Eva and her friends, the Archangel will let no-one threaten her mistress!

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Nimrod
Description: Escaped from another dimension, Nimrod is a powerful mutant which was once a king and the builder of a powerful empire. Death means nothing for Nimrod and nothing will stop him in his quest to restore his former empire.\n \n- Free mutant obtained by defeating Nimrod in Celsius Heroes -

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Engineer
Description: Engineers are strange creatures. They probably created human kind millions of years ago, but they also created the Xenomorphs, one of Humanity's worst enemies. Some say they are Gods. However they can be seen fighting regular Mutants.

Name: Emotional Maskerade
Description: In all circumstances, everyone wears a mask. The mask of their own existence and their own reality. When the mask becomes reality, we become actors in our own existence. And when the masks all come to life together, reality is turned upside down. The true origin of this mutant is unknown

Name: No Name

Name: The Screencaster
Description: In the underground world, there are many Necro mutants with functions similar to those on the surface. Among them are damaged objects possessed by disturbed spirits, attempting to revive the memory of these objects' past. This possessed television set has managed to build its own underground media empire and regularly kidnaps people from the surface to have guests on its variety show.

Name: Professor Chronomantik
Description: This former history teacher, lost in time following a time machine accident, found himself propelled through various eras, during which he was able to build his famous ink cannon and adapt it to locally available elements. However, his time-travel abilities have been limited by the size of his mutation, and traces of his passage remain in multiple eras.

Name: Origamix
Description: This strange creature is made of paper, both literally and figuratively. It was born from the strong will of a master origami artist who had created numerous works and poured all his creativity into one final project: a living fold capable of taking on multiple forms. Be careful, though—it's easy to cut yourself with so much paper!

Name: Giganto-Moai
Description: This specimen discovered on Easter Island is more of an organometallic life form than a simple robot. What civilization could have put them there, and when? These are just some of the questions that trouble Mutenstein, who seems to be hiding a great deal from us...

Name: Black I.C.E.
Description: This extremely advanced security system is programmed to injure or even kill intruders in computer systems, unlike many other systems which seek only to protect or expel. Initially reserved for entities purely made up of data on the network, the application of the program to a mutant with advanced combat capabilities has revolutionized the world of space security. However, it can sometimes be a little too dangerous and lethal...

Name: Mecargoyle
Description: For centuries, it has waited patiently atop ancient buildings. The passage of time has damaged many of its stone parts, which have gradually been replaced with modernized metal versions, such as its claws and wings. And now it has finally awakened to the world, watching motionless from the rooftops, ready to pounce brutally on unsuspecting prey.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Perfitrouille
Description: A treacherous spirit born from a pumpkin seed. This embodiment of Trick or Treats imitates childish behaviour at Halloween time to collect candy and and make cruel (and sometimes deadly) pranks at the expense of all others... Don't fall for its childish smile, this mutant could very well make your life a real nightmare.

Name: Greensward Rager
Description: An undead zooanthropic horror, inadvertently created during experiments to try and eradicate myxomatosis once and for all. The disease was effectively eradicated, but it had unforeseen effects on some of the infected rabbits, mutating some of them into monstrosities capable of ravaging an entire field overnight.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Irradiance
Description: An entity with power comparable to that of a god, sealed for centuries in a stained glass window, radiating power and light. The stained glass window was freed during the renovation of a cathedral, allowing this entity to escape, before being recaptured and forced to fight in the arenas of Genetic City. Do not succumb to its honeyed promises

Name: Breakmaster
Description: Step up to the beat. /nNever take a hit. /nDance along with it. /nProve you’re an athlete. /n/nThis was the motto of the scientific team who tried to make the first dancing and battling mutant ever. The rhymes permeated their work so deeply that it led them to a breakdancing mutant, using its capabilities to fight in unseen ways in the Arena.

Name: Fleet Captain Blackbeard
Description: The most famous of all freebooters has been regenerated in an idealized version of the Caribbean, where he is now the greatest pirate in the universe... Can you steal his title and become the Lord of Plunder?

Name: Blue King
Description: This lazy king is accustomed to betrayal and backroom assassinations. In order to never be defeated by his enemies, he has developed methods that allow him to fight directly from his throne. He has even developed means of teleportation to both hide and strike his opponents from behind.

Name: Don Gamberetti
Description: Since the rediscovery of Neo-Atlantis and the construction of underwater arenas for thrill-seeking audiences, underwater exploration has developed significantly. And as in many large cities, organized crime has left its mark on this underwater city. This mutant is the embodiment of this, the leader of the largest mafia on the seabed, despite his modest origins near the Sicilian coast. Armed with an automatic machine gun in one of his claws, he was able to dethrone all the other lieutenants of the previous Don, whether they were pistol shrimp or octopus wrestlers. Now he runs his criminal empire with an iron claw from his 1920s-style bar.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Ice Dancer Yria
Description: In order to combat gratuitous violence, a European team based around the Baltic Sea developed a mutant dedicated to figure skating. However, the latter's fighting instincts ultimately proved to be more important than his natural grace and ability to perform tricks. So it was simply that Yria ended up in the arenas of Genetic City despite the destiny that was promised to him.

Name: B.U.N. Overmind
Description: This cybernetic unit directs all B.U.N. Tower operations from its top floor. No information is available on the particulars of the acronym B.U.N.

Name: The Crawling Madness
Description: A crawling horror of unknown origin, blending characteristics of arachnids, scorpions, scolopendras and other arthropod predators. Its venom is lethal even at very low doses, but acts particularly slowly, causing horrible pain and agony that can last for days. An antidote is currently being developed, but its success rate remains below 30% for the time being. Who is the mad scientist who developed this creature and released it in Genetic City? The mystery still remains...

Name: Jurassic Terror
Description: This dinosaur monster, covered in spikes and blades, is the fruit of research carried out by various laboratories into new forms of fighting dinosaurs, designed specifically for the arena. Some would say that this particular form was revealed by a multiversal creature. Watch out for the bleeding!

Name: Bestial Overlord
Description: Numerous cryptids have been created over the course of time, most through failed genetic manipulation. One laboratory, however, succeeded in combining top predators from continents, skies, oceans and the past. Their research data was sent to Genetic City University for replication, but when an award was due to be presented, none of the project's participants gave any sign of life...

Name: Supermassive Infinity
Description: This three-headed space serpent, classified in the Ouroboros family, is capable of modifying its density and synchronizing its three bodies to generate spectacular accelerations or points of infinite density. Its relative mass could not be correctly estimated, as in most cases the subject fled during the observation.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: D.A.B.
Description: After extensive research by a large banking consortium to make ATMs more welcoming and user-friendly, in order to boost user confidence and prevent hacking attempts, a number of incidents occurred involving customers who were rather annoyed by the machines' AI. Wishing to cover up the affair, the consortium blamed the machine's creators and reused their concept to develop a mutant that directly attacks its opponents with raw gold bars.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Hydrydra
Description: This sea monster seems to be made almost entirely of water, making it particularly resistant to direct attack. According to various sources, its multi-headed shape enables it to attack in all directions and to constantly monitor its surroundings, preventing it from being taken by surprise.

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: K'Yu T'ypaï
Description: This creature of extraterrestrial origin, apparently escaped from one of Mutenstein's laboratories, has, according to him, the ability to transform all other creatures into cute things. Why would Mutenstein have such a creature if he hates cuteness so much?

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Zagam, Great King of Greed
Description: This sinister demon, President and King of a huge part of the underworld, is said to be capable of transforming any metal into usable currency... And he is very generous with those who make a pact with him... But demonic pacts are far from without consequences...

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Vanir Queen Freyja
Description: As part of an exploration commissioned by Mutenstein, Eva and Urban arrived in a dimension and temporality close to the Viking era, but ruled by deity-bound mutants. After defeating it, some archaeological treasures were brought back by the group in order to study Viking civilization in detail beyond the known residual texts, and they were able to recover fragments of this mutant's DNA from these artifacts so they could verify the nature of these mutants.

Name: Seraphic Core
Description: A strange creature emanating a powerful light, the mere sight of which has driven mad some of the scientists who have tried to study it. Only Psy-Captains with minds of steel dare attempt to dominate this mutant, and most often with great effort.

Name: Twilight Prophet
Description: An extremely powerful mystical entity from a dimension where magic reigns supreme. The Prophetess travels worlds and dimensions to spread mysticism and overwhelm all dimensions with a flood of unparalleled mystical power, regardless of the impact on the inhabitants of those dimensions.

Name: Automaton
Description: This entirely mechanical artificial creature has been reformulated by studying works from the end of the 2nd millennium, while adding modern energy sources to enable it to have infinite autonomy, beyond even the survival of our technological civilizations.

Name: Spectroplasm
Description: This ectoplasmic entity is particularly unstable. Created as simple cells during the study of ectoplasmic fluids, it continued to evolve until it reached full consciousness. Capable of possessing other mutants and generating powerful ectoplasmic explosions, the entity has been confined to use in arenas to avoid further major problems related to the possession of mutants.

Name: Gladiator
Description: What would an arena be without gladiators? Not much, according to some researchers in Roman history, who have recovered genetic fragments from several famous gladiators of the Roman era to create a true champion, ready to die under the shouts of the boisterous crowd!

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Spiraxia
Description: The raw power of the stars, condensed into a humanoid form capable of interacting with the rest of the universe. That was the mandate given to the scientists and astronomers who designed this mutant using data from radio telescopes around the world. And the results have exceeded their expectations in many ways. What will happen once it is propelled into the arenas of Genetic City?

Name: Magician
Description: This little creature has powerful magical abilities, but they are not unlimited. Fortunately, it has learned to do without magic and throw its spellbook at enemies with devastating force. Don't let it catch you off guard!

Name: No Name
Description: no description

Name: Glitchy Heart
Description: A final boss from an old video game, found by Darwin, who has taken root in reality following some rather dubious connections. He has reflexes and ways of doing things very similar to those of bosses from days gone by: kidnapping princesses, creating massive complexes with elevators several kilometers high... All this to be defeated by heroes of exceptional courage.

Name: Telluric Starweaver
Description: This mutant with druidic characteristics came into possession of a strange staff made of meteorite materials that had traveled across the galaxy. Thanks to this technologically advanced object, he was able to manipulate stars and constellations beyond human comprehension. Unfortunately, what he didn't know was that by doing so, he would affect reality by altering the very structure of our universe to create mutants based on these stars.
